verses.text: Woe to the destroyer who will himself be destroyed when his spoiling is done; the people cry, 'O LORD, be gracious unto us.' The treacherous reap treachery. In trouble the godly turn to God for grace and strength.

Woe to the destroyer who will himself be destroyed when his spoiling is done; the people cry, 'O LORD, be gracious unto us.' The treacherous reap treachery. In trouble the godly turn to God for grace and strength.

Woe to the destroyer who will himself be destroyed when his spoiling is done; the people cry, 'O LORD, be gracious unto us.' The treacherous reap treachery. In trouble the godly turn to God for grace and strength.

Woe to the destroyer who will himself be destroyed when his spoiling is done; the people cry, 'O LORD, be gracious unto us.' The treacherous reap treachery. In trouble the godly turn to God for grace and strength.

The LORD is exalted, filling Zion with judgment and righteousness; 'wisdom and knowledge shall be the stability of thy times.' He is the people's security. The fear of the LORD is the treasure that steadies an age.

The LORD is exalted, filling Zion with judgment and righteousness; 'wisdom and knowledge shall be the stability of thy times.' He is the people's security. The fear of the LORD is the treasure that steadies an age.
The valiant cry, the highways lie waste, the land mourns under the invader. Distress is widespread. When God withdraws peace, even the strong are reduced to weeping.
The valiant cry, the highways lie waste, the land mourns under the invader. Distress is widespread. When God withdraws peace, even the strong are reduced to weeping.
The valiant cry, the highways lie waste, the land mourns under the invader. Distress is widespread. When God withdraws peace, even the strong are reduced to weeping.
'Now will I rise, saith the LORD'; the enemy's plans shall come to nothing, and the peoples be burned like thorns. God arises at the right moment. The schemes of the wicked end in ash.
'Now will I rise, saith the LORD'; the enemy's plans shall come to nothing, and the peoples be burned like thorns. God arises at the right moment. The schemes of the wicked end in ash.
'Now will I rise, saith the LORD'; the enemy's plans shall come to nothing, and the peoples be burned like thorns. God arises at the right moment. The schemes of the wicked end in ash.

Who can dwell with 'the devouring fire' of God's holiness? He that walks righteously and speaks uprightly; such a one dwells on high in safety. Holiness alone abides with God. The upright find refuge where sinners are consumed.

'Thine eyes shall see the king in his beauty' and a land of far distances; the fierce, taunting foe shall be seen no more. Fear gives place to glory. The redeemed behold their King and dread their enemies no longer.

'Thine eyes shall see the king in his beauty' and a land of far distances; the fierce, taunting foe shall be seen no more. Fear gives place to glory. The redeemed behold their King and dread their enemies no longer.

'Thine eyes shall see the king in his beauty' and a land of far distances; the fierce, taunting foe shall be seen no more. Fear gives place to glory. The redeemed behold their King and dread their enemies no longer.

Look upon Zion, a quiet habitation; 'the LORD is our judge, the LORD is our lawgiver, the LORD is our king; he will save us.' God is all in all to His city. The threefold office of the LORD is His people's whole salvation.

Look upon Zion, a quiet habitation; 'the LORD is our judge, the LORD is our lawgiver, the LORD is our king; he will save us.' God is all in all to His city. The threefold office of the LORD is His people's whole salvation.

Look upon Zion, a quiet habitation; 'the LORD is our judge, the LORD is our lawgiver, the LORD is our king; he will save us.' God is all in all to His city. The threefold office of the LORD is His people's whole salvation.
Even the lame shall take the prey, and no inhabitant shall say, 'I am sick,' for the people's iniquity is forgiven. Pardon brings healing. Where sin is forgiven, weakness itself is turned to victory.
